acceptOwnership().details: The new owner accepts the ownership transfer.

constructor.details: Reverts `NumWorkersBelowMinimum()` if `strategies` is empty.      Reverts `LengthMismatch()` if array lengths differ.      Reverts `InvalidStrategy(strategy)` if any strategy > `MAX_STRATEGY`.

params.datas: Array of strategy-specific packed data, one per worker.
params.owner_: The address that will own this contract.
params.strategies: Array of strategy ids, one per worker (index = workerId).
params.values: Array of config values, one per worker.

getAllWorkerConfigs().details: Lets the protocol layer fetch the full per-epoch fee policy with a single EVM      transition instead of `numWorkers + 1` separate reads.

returns.datas_: Strategy-specific packed data for each worker, indexed by worker id.
returns.strategies_: Strategy id for each worker, indexed by worker id.
returns.values_: Config value for each worker, indexed by worker id.

getWorkerConfig(uint16).details: Returns `(0, 0, 0)` for workers that have never been configured.

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

pendingOwner().details: Returns the address of the pending owner.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

setNumWorkers(uint16).details: Reverts with `MissingWorkerConfig(i)` if any worker `0 .. numWorkers_-1`      has never had a config explicitly written.

setWorkerConfig(uint16,uint8,uint64,uint.details: Allows setting configs for any `workerId`, including those beyond the      current `numWorkers`. Coverage is validated when `setNumWorkers` is called.      Reverts `InvalidStrategy(strategy)` if `strategy > MAX_STRATEGY`.

params.data: Strategy-specific packed data forwarded to the protocol layer.
params.strategy: The raw strategy id (stored without interpretation).

setWorkerConfigsBatch(uint16[],uint8[],u.details: Reverts `LengthMismatch()` if array lengths differ.      Reverts `InvalidStrategy(strategy)` if any `strategy > MAX_STRATEGY`.

params.datas: Array of strategy-specific packed data, one per worker.
params.strategies: Array of strategy ids, one per worker.
params.values: Array of config values, one per worker.

transferOwnership(address).details: Starts the ownership transfer of the contract to a new account. Replaces the pending transfer if there is one. Can only be called by the current owner. Setting `newOwner` to the zero address is allowed; this can be used to cancel an initiated ownership transfer.

MAX_STRATEGY().notice: Highest strategy id this contract accepts.

constructor.notice: Deploy with initial configs for every worker.

getAllWorkerConfigs().notice: Return every worker's config in one call.

getWorkerConfig(uint16).notice: Return the stored config for a worker.

numWorkers().notice: The number of workers (used by protocol at epoch boundaries).

setWorkerConfig(uint16,uint8,uint64,uint.notice: Set or update the fee config for a specific worker.

setWorkerConfigsBatch(uint16[],uint8[],u.notice: Set or update fee configs for multiple workers in a single call.
